title: If You Use Agent Zero, This Video is for You (EPIC FAIL)
summary: Jordan Urbs attempts to build an ad campaign generator using Agent Zero but encounters persistent LiteLLM errors that make the framework unsuitable for production work. He documents the workflow architecture, troubleshooting attempts, and concludes that Claude Code or OpenClaw would have been more reliable alternatives.
